runners.formComment: Was in the placings last time but prior to that was an eye-catching winner scoring by 1.5 lengths in a NG at this track and clocking an excellent 17.37 for the 324m trip. Can feature on best figures.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was in the placings last time but prior to that was an eye-catching winner scoring by 1.5 lengths in a NG at this track and clocking an excellent 17.37 for the 324m trip. Can feature on best figures.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: At start wanted to shift to outside of track and came together.

runners.formComment: Found some support last start but struggled and finished 4th over 324m at this track beaten 2 lengths (17.58) behind Storms Will Roll in a NG on March 19. Placed two back at Bulli. Has run very fast time at this course and distance. Go close on his best form.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Found some support last start but struggled and finished 4th over 324m at this track beaten 2 lengths (17.58) behind Storms Will Roll in a NG on March 19. Placed two back at Bulli. Has run very fast time at this course and distance. Go close on his best form.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Passing the first turn came together; Rounding the home turn raced wide.

runners.formComment: Nearing another win after her success on March 19 at this track over 324m. Last start was third over 324m in 17.87, behind Doonside Lewis. Has a blistering 17.41 best time at this course and distance. Worth including.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Nearing another win after her success on March 19 at this track over 324m. Last start was third over 324m in 17.87, behind Doonside Lewis. Has a blistering 17.41 best time at this course and distance. Worth including.

runners.formComment: Returns from a four months break and only other fresh up run was on debut, when a 35.62 winner over 622m at Richmond. Others make more appeal.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Returns from a four months break and only other fresh up run was on debut, when a 35.62 winner over 622m at Richmond. Others make more appeal.

runners.formComment: In the money last time at this track (17.48) in a NG, finishing a 2.25 lengths third. Yet to miss the frame from five starts from the draw, including two wins. Can hit the frame with the right run.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In the money last time at this track (17.48) in a NG, finishing a 2.25 lengths third. Yet to miss the frame from five starts from the draw, including two wins. Can hit the frame with the right run.

runners.formComment: Lines up from box 6 for the first time after finishing a 6 length sixth at Grafton (25.69) in a Grade 5. Makes strong appeal.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Lines up from box 6 for the first time after finishing a 6 length sixth at Grafton (25.69) in a Grade 5. Makes strong appeal.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shifted out midway through the race and raced tight.

runners.formComment: Finished in the placings last time but the run prior he was an impressive winner after racing just off the speed, scoring by 2.5 lengths in a Grade 5 at Richmond and clocking an excellent 29.51 for the 520m trip. Will need to find best form.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Finished in the placings last time but the run prior he was an impressive winner after racing just off the speed, scoring by 2.5 lengths in a Grade 5 at Richmond and clocking an excellent 29.51 for the 520m trip. Will need to find best form.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Knuckled as the start was effect, became unbalanced and began slowly.

runners.formComment: Solid performance to win by 1.75 lengths at this track over 324m (17.31) beating Storms Will Roll in NG on April 9. Expected to go well again.
